title: stellaria depressa var. depressa
intro: Stellaria depressa var. depressa, commonly known as depresssed chickweed, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and swelling, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Stellaria depressa var. depressa can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
